executive_summary: AgriTech Innovators seeks seed funding of 50,00,000 through SISFS to bring smart IoT sensors to smallholder farmers.
problem_statement: Indian agriculture faces low productivity due to lack of real-time soil data and supply chain gaps.
proposed_solution: Our AI-powered platform connects IoT soil sensors directly to mobile advice for farmers.
budget_breakdown:
Technology Development: 20,00,000 INR
Operations: 15,00,000 INR
Marketing: 10,00,000 INR
Contingency: 5,00,000 INR
timeline:
Phase 1 (Month 1-3): MVP Development & sensor iteration
Phase 2 (Month 4-6): Pilot testing in Karnataka
Phase 3 (Month 7-12): Scale & market launch
team_qualifications: Our team brings 15+ years of combined experience in agriculture technology and hardware development.
